id: # One row per surveyed donor member. Only 'id' is required; leave any cell blank if not surveyed.
# condition_grade: A (as-new) | B (minor) | C (significant) | D (unsuitable -> quarantined)
# verification_status: mill_cert | coupon_tested | documented | visual_only | unverified (-> quarantined)
# knockdown: optional explicit f_y factor (<=1) that overrides the derived condition x verification factor
# recoverable_length_mm: usable length after de-construction (defaults to the member's physical length)
